overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character ascending a stairwell in an industrial apartment building, walking through neon-lit corridors, and entering V's apartment. The environment features gritty cyberpunk aesthetics with concrete structures, graffiti, digital billboards, and vibrant neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with graffiti and wooden handrails

events.description: begins ascending the concrete staircase from the lower level

agents.ego_description: walking up a dimly lit concrete stairwell with wooden handrails and embedded step lights

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with dark steps leading upward
wooden handrail with metal supports on the left side of stairs
wooden handrail with integrated lighting on the right side
concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags near the top of the stairs
long fluorescent light mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a gritty concrete stairwell in an industrial building. Wooden handrails line both sides of the stairs, with the right side featuring embedded lighting. Graffiti becomes visible on the right wall as the player climbs toward the upper landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial apartment corridor with vending machines

events.description: exits stairwell into upper corridor with vending machines and digital displays
passes close by a pedestrian in dark clothing walking the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dimly lit corridor, passing vending machines and digital billboards while avoiding other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking toward the camera through the corridor

entered.detail: tall vending machine with glowing green display showing beverage advertisements
large digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on the right wall
chain-link metal gate blocking off a side area
exposed industrial pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the stairwell into a narrow industrial corridor lined with exposed ceiling pipes. A glowing vending machine stands on the left while digital billboards illuminate the right wall. The player passes by a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction as they navigate toward the apartment entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment entrance hallway with security door

events.description: approaches and opens the apartment door, transitioning from public corridor to private residence

agents.ego_description: approaching the apartment door and entering V's private residence

entered.detail: metal security door with keypad entry system leading to V's apartment
electronic keypad mounted on the door frame for access control
distinctive hexagonal patterned floor tiles visible upon entering the apartment
built-in wardrobe with glass doors showing hanging clothes

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the corridor and approaches a secure metal apartment door with an electronic keypad. After entering, the scene transitions into the apartment entryway, revealing hexagonal floor tiles and a built-in closet wardrobe on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk studio apartment with neon city views

events.description: enters the apartment proper with dramatic shift to blue and red neon lighting from window signs
turns toward the living area revealing the sofa, coffee table, and large windows with city views

agents.ego_description: moving through the apartment to survey the living space, bedroom area, and bathroom while observing the neon-lit cityscape through the windows

entered.detail: modern curved sofa with blue upholstery in the living area
low white coffee table with various items scattered on top
large windows showing glowing red and blue neon advertisements from neighboring buildings
platform bed with dark bedding in the sleeping area
rotating ceiling fan with lights mounted above the living space
sliding door leading to the bathroom area with visible sink

segments.scene_description: Inside the apartment, the lighting shifts dramatically to vibrant neon blues and reds streaming through large windows overlooking the city. The player explores the open-plan space, revealing a curved sofa, coffee table, and bed area. Neon signs from adjacent buildings illuminate the room while a ceiling fan rotates overhead, creating a quintessential cyberpunk domestic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty industrial stairwell into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk apartment. It begins with an ascent up concrete stairs lined with wooden handrails and graffiti, moving steadily upward toward a landing. As the camera emerges from the stairwell, the environment shifts into a narrow industrial corridor filled with exposed ceiling pipes, glowing vending machines, and digital billboards. The scene then progresses toward a secure metal door with an electronic keypad, transitioning through the entryway and its hexagonal floor tiles into the main living space. Finally, the lighting transforms into a dramatic wash of neon blues and reds as the camera explores an open-plan room featuring a curved sofa and a rotating ceiling fan under the glow of the city skyline.
